zh.lifeSummary: 當John Knyvet於1322年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾素維其可時，他的父親Richard Knyvett11319歲，母親Joan Worth27歲。他於1347年與Eleanor Basset在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1361年被列為justice of the court of common pleas。他去世於1381年2月16日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾素維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Knyvet于1322年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾素維其可时，他的父亲Richard Knyvett11319岁，母亲Joan Worth27岁。他于1347年与Eleanor Basset在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1361年被列为justice of the court of common pleas。他去世于1381年2月16日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾素維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Knyvet

variants.name: Knivett
meanings: English: from a Norman French pronunciation of Knight , resulting from the Norman French difficulty with the h of Old English cniht.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Knyvet was born in 1322, in Southwick, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Richard Knyvett, was 11319 and his mother, Joan Worth, was 27. He married Eleanor Basset in 1347, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. In 1361, at the age of 39, his occupation is listed as justice of the court of common pleas. He died on 16 February 1381, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Southwick, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Knyvet est né en 1322, à Southwick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Knyvett, avait 11319 ans et sa mère, Joan Worth, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Basset en 1347, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. En 1361, à l’âge de 39 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the court of common pleas. Il est décédé le 16 février 1381, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Southwick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Knyvet 1322 in Southwick, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Knyvett 11319 und seine Mutter Joan Worth 27. Er hat 1347 in England Eleanor Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1361, als er 39 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of the court of common pleas aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Februar 1381 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Southwick, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Knyvet è nato il nel 1322 nel Southwick, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Knyvett, aveva 11319 anni e il suo madre, Joan Worth, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Basset nel 1347, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1361, all'età di 39 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the court of common pleas. Morì il 16 febbraio 1381, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Southwick, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Knyvetが1322年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソウスウィックで生まれた時，父Richard Knyvettは11319歳，母Joan Worthは27歳であった。1347年にイギリスでEleanor Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1361年，39歳の時，職業はjustice of the court of common pleasと記録されている。彼は1381年2月16日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソウスウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Knyvet(이)가 1322년 영국 노르섬프토실르 소우스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Knyvett(은)는 11319세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Worth(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1347년 영국에서 Eleanor Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1361년, 39세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justice of the court of common pleas이었다. 그는 1381년 2월 16일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 소우스윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Knyvet nasceu em 1322, em Southwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Knyvett, tinha 11319 anos e sua mãe, Joan Worth, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Basset em 1347, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1361, com 39 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of the court of common pleas. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1381, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Southwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Knyvet родился в 1322 г. в местности соутвикк, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Knyvett было 11319 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Worth, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Basset в 1347 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1361 году, в возрасте 39 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of the court of common pleas. Он умер 16 февраля 1381 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности соутвикк, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Knyvet nació en 1322, en Southwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Knyvett, tenía 11319 años y su mamá, Joan Worth, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Eleanor Basset en 1347, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1361, a la edad de 39 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of the court of common pleas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1381, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Southwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
